name: gem-activator
description: GEM infrastructure setup — ensures /mnt/efs-system/engdefs/ exists and verifies AppDevelopment.jar is present. Does NOT flip the GEM enable bit — that requires VCDS/ODIS on adaptation 5F channel 6. This module just prepares the filesystem so other modules' screens load correctly once GEM is enabled by a diagnostic tool.
author: dspl1236
scripts: gem_enable.sh - Set up engdefs infrastructure (prints VCDS instructions)
gem_disable.sh - Clean up infrastructure (prints VCDS instructions)
gem_status.sh - Report what is present on the MMI (read-only)

requires_external_tool.tool: VCDS, ODIS E17, or equivalent UDS diagnostic interface
requires_external_tool.action: Set adaptation on module 5F, channel 6, value 1
requires_external_tool.reason: The GEM enable bit lives in persistent adaptation memory and is only writable over UDS. There is no SD-script method to set it.

notes: Older versions of this module claimed to enable GEM from an SD script. That was wrong — the 'Keldo activator' everyone references is the nav-database unblocker (see nav-unblocker module), not a GEM enabler. This version is honest about what SD scripts can and cannot do.
